selection_protocol.validation: Generate validation predictions for all six feedback conditions.
selection_protocol.test: Evaluate the held-out test split only after selecting/reporting the planned comparison set.
selection_protocol.reporting: Report full-program and line-patch results separately, with WA/CE/RE/TLE/MLE breakdowns.

resume_policy.training: Rerunning the same command resumes from the latest checkpoint unless --overwrite is passed.
resume_policy.generation: Prediction files append missing record IDs unless --overwrite is passed.
resume_policy.evaluation: Generation diagnostics and execution evaluation are generated into separate files.
